segment.source: Renders an optional intro (eyebrow, heading) above a two-, three-, or four-column grid of compact product cards, each with image, name, price, one-line description, and a 'View product' link. Use it for: product listings and catalog excerpts — assortments, price lists with items and photos, 'our products' overviews. Prefer 'Single Product Card' for one item, 'Product Comparison Grid' to contrast specs, and 'Category Cards' for navigation into shop sections.
